---
name: spreadsheet-wizard
description: >
  Use when the user says: 'help with my spreadsheet', 'spreadsheet work needed', 'data analysis on Excel',
  'analyze spreadsheet data', 'work on this spreadsheet'.
  Use when the user needs help with spreadsheet formulas, data analysis, or organizing data in Excel or Google Sheets.
  Do NOT use for: database queries, coding in Python/R for analysis, or non-spreadsheet data analysis.
---

# Overview

The spreadsheet-wizard skill helps users work with spreadsheets including formulas, data analysis, and layout.

## Process

1. Receive spreadsheet or describe the spreadsheet task
2. Identify the specific request (formula, analysis, layout)
3. Provide spreadsheet-specific guidance
4. Return formatted instructions or formulas
